_meta.sources: OurAirports (airports), ACI World 2024 (cargo hubs), industry rate guides 2025-2026 (FreightAmigo/Webcargo/Drewry-cited), IATA volumetric standard, IATA DGR (rules summarized - full text must be licensed)
_meta.note: Rates are PLANNING approximations for v1. Real quotes need live carrier API (v2).

chargeable_weight.note: Cargo below 167 kg/m3 is charged on volume, not actual weight. REQUIRES intake to capture dimensions.

rate_reference_usd_per_kg._basis: 2025-2026 published ranges, China/Asia origin. Heavier shipments (>1000kg) ~10-20% lower per kg.

transit_days_door_to_door._note: Flight itself is hours; door-to-door includes pickup, screening, customs.

uld_specs._note: Belly (passenger) aircraft take LD-series only; oversized needs freighter + PMC.

dangerous_goods_air_rules._source: IATA DGR 67th Ed (2026) - summarized, license required for full per-UN tables

lithium_ion_UN3480.soc_rule: from 1 Jan 2026 must ship at <=30% state of charge; above needs State-of-origin + State-of-operator written approval (Special Provision A331)
lithium_ion_UN3480.passenger_aircraft: restricted/forbidden as cargo on many; cargo-aircraft-only common
lithium_ion_UN3480.required_doc: IATA Shipper's Declaration for Dangerous Goods + lithium handling label

dangerous_goods_air_rules.general: each UN number has an assigned Packing Instruction and a passenger/cargo-only/forbidden status in the DGR table. THIS IS AN AUTHORED TABLE - no free dataset.

documents_air.lead_time: obtain from cell maker - can be slow
